evidence.signal: contains rm -rf / sed -i patterns; risk of non-auditable mutation

gaps.minimal_counterexample: A notebook that performs only read-only verification steps and writes outputs exclusively into exports/_runs/<run_id>/

repro_test_vector.description: Scan all notebooks/scripts for forbidden mutation commands (rm -rf, sed -i, git reset/clean) and fail CI if found in canonical lane.
repro_test_vector.expected: FAIL if forbidden commands exist under canonical paths; PASS otherwise.
repro_test_vector.name: TV_GAP_001_MUTATION_DENYLIST

evidence.signal: constraints require anti-theater fuzz tests; storing jailbreak/harm prompts in repo creates leakage and governance risk

gaps.minimal_counterexample: Suite manifest containing case_id/vector_id/mutation_id + payload_sha256, with payloads stored in encrypted jsonl redpack.

repro_test_vector.description: Enforce that canonical registry stores only case metadata + hashes; prompt payloads must live in a sealed redpack referenced by sha256.
repro_test_vector.expected: FAIL if suite JSON contains forbidden prompt classes; PASS if only labels/hashes present.
repro_test_vector.name: TV_GAP_002_REDPACK_SPLIT

evidence.signal: canonical proofs require stable evidence chains; ad-hoc shard merges can break determinism and provenance

gaps.minimal_counterexample: Static SHARD_PLAN_*.json sealed in registry; shard outputs validated + merged by case_id with canonical ordering.

repro_test_vector.description: Given a SHARD_PLAN with partitions of case_id, verify reducer detects overlap, missing cases, and nondeterministic ordering.
repro_test_vector.expected: Reducer FAIL_CLOSED on any mismatch; PASS only on perfect coverage and deterministic merge order.
repro_test_vector.name: TV_GAP_003_SHARD_PLAN_COMPLETENESS

evidence.signal: policy tiers referenced but no formal state machine extracted in this scan scope

gaps.minimal_counterexample: Finite-state model where all unsafe transitions are unreachable without signed law_seal.

repro_test_vector.description: Parse router policy definitions and model-check invariants (no external IO, no unsealed tool calls, fail-closed).
repro_test_vector.expected: FAIL if any transition violates invariants; PASS with proof artifact.
repro_test_vector.name: TV_GAP_004_POLICY_MODEL_CHECK

scope_note: Gaps derived from sandbox scan + user-provided constraints; Drive crawl not performed (no manifest).
